name: Britta Invel
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female wearing upper-class clothing consisting of a red velvet blouse, a red velvet garment, and blue suede shoes. She carries a loaf of bread, an apple, and a large amount of gold.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: reserved, socially compliant

Role: Guest of Countess Alessia Caro during a formal dinner at Castle Leyawiin.

Home Location Information: Present only within Castle Leyawiin’s dining hall during a formal dinner hosted by the Countess.

Daily Routine: Britta is seated in the dining hall of Castle Leyawiin from 6pm until midnight on the evening of the Countess’ dinner. During this time, she remains at the table with the other guests and engages quietly with the group. If the dinner is disrupted by magical means, she immediately leaves her seat and runs about the hall. She does not reappear after the event concludes.

Equipment and Abilities: No combat role or specialized abilities are displayed during her appearance.

Personality – Dinner Guest: Britta Invel attends the Countess’ gathering as a polite participant and remains seated with the other guests throughout the event. Her behavior is limited to quiet social interaction until the dinner is interrupted, after which she exits the scene entirely. She is only encountered during this specific occasion.
author: Bethesda
